title: Katana'd
description: This changes the textures of swords into Katanas.
body:
This texture pack I made is for Java only. This resource pack is called Simple Daggerz and Outlined Orez. This changes vanilla swords into daggers and vanilla ores to be outlined. I know, I know I'm not popular yet, but I have to try this because I wanted to find a new hobby. I really appreciate it if you download my resource pack and try it for the first time, even though it looks bad at the first place. I'm still learning how to make resource packs and I'll still try my best to improve it.

Also Available at CurseForge. 
![CurseForge Picture Logo](https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1675871207499898880/XXsS5Uva_400x400.png)
